embeds.title: Guild Items
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
The Guilds of Ost in Edhil

	- True political power in the city
	- Five ranks in each (Guild Master, Council, Member, Initiate, Recruit), each with their own item
	- Items cannot be obtained except by rising through the ranks of the guild.

embeds.title: <:d20:704040692946698361>500 - Concocktion of Gender Fluidity
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
Based upon a limited application of the Alter Self spell, this potion allows the imbiber to alter their genetalia. For the duration of the scene, the character can change their sexual organs at will between male, futa, and female. Precise size and shape are also within their control.

footer.text: This is an RP only item and has no mechanical effect.

embeds.title: <:d20:704040692946698361>5000 - Jar of Living Tentacles

embeds.title: <:d20:704040692946698361>10,000 - Bracelet of Body Swapping
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
A contrasting set of paired bracelets, which two consenting individuals may activate. The bracelets transfer their consciousnesses to their partner's body. The effects last for the duration of the scene, or until dismissed by either party, at will.

The effect temporarily grants full voluntary control of the body in which their consciousness resides. It lasts only as long as both parties remain wiling, and both bracelets are worn within the same room as one another. The individuals' consciousnesses return to their own body upon the conclusion of the scene.
